profile_bio.description: The Home of @GoKiteAI’s Community and Ecosystem run by Poki | Join our Discord: https://t.co/cYaqpvZVZR.

quoted_tweet.text:
Kite AI has officially entered the production era with the launch of the Kite Mainnet, establishing the foundational infrastructure for the global agentic economy. Here is what we delivered over the past two weeks:

1️⃣ We launched the Kite Mainnet, the first blockchain purpose-built for agentic payments, featuring a dedicated settlement layer designed for high-frequency, machine-native stablecoin transactions.
2️⃣ We introduced the Kite Agent Passport, providing AI agents with verifiable identity and programmable spending limits to autonomously negotiate and pay while keeping users in total control.
3️⃣ We achieved full compatibility with @Google AP2 and integrated $PYUSD with @PayPal, enabling agents to securely shop and settle transactions using regulated, dollar-denominated assets.
4️⃣ We partnered with @okx to join the Agent Payments Protocol (APP) and collaborated with @avax to bring agentic identity and payments into institutional-grade production environments.
5️⃣ We solidified our network foundation with a suite of launch partners including @MessariCrypto for research, @HalbornSecurity for security audits, and @LayerZero_Core for omnichain connectivity.
6️⃣ We enhanced the developer experience by integrating @privy_io for Web2-style onboarding and @crossmint to enable agents to shop directly at major e-commerce merchants.
7️⃣ We showcased live agentic payment demos at @UCBerkeley Haas and addressed the @USC Blockchain Conference on why stablecoin-native rails are essential for autonomous machine commerce.
8️⃣ We expanded our global footprint at the Web3 Festival in Hong Kong and signaled our upcoming presence at @consensus2026 to connect with the next wave of AI and fintech innovators.
9️⃣ We opened early access for the Kite Passport to the public and continued our Community Growth Plan with AI sharing sessions focused on the core pillars of the agentic economy.

The rails for machine-to-machine value exchange are now live and scaling. 🪁
